posts.author: Lindaaberg (Linda)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I’m seeing it difficult to not having Outlook Calender integration working on subitems rather just on the main board, since activities are more frequently connect to a meeting/event where as the group in it self acts as a place to gather and collect relevant activities connected to a specific phase or area.

What are you trying to achieve

I want the outlook calender automation to work for subitems

posts.author: kevinfantasymedia (Kevin - Fantasy Media LTD)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Lindaaberg

What you’re looking for is in here → Outlook Calendar Integration Plus.

image2334×632 45 KB

image2232×638 26.8 KB

You can take advantage of the app’s free plan. Check it out and see if it fits your case. If you have questions, I’m happy to help! kevin@fantasymedia.io
